---
name: Milestone proposal
description: Propose a new roadmap milestone or change to milestone order
title: "Milestone: "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Proposed milestone

Name the milestone.

## Layer

- [ ] Layer 0: Observation
- [ ] Layer 1: Measurement
- [ ] Layer 2: Governance
- [ ] Layer 3: Constitutional interpretation
- [ ] Layer 4: Portfolio governance

## Dependency position

What must happen before this milestone?

## Deliverables

List concrete outputs.

## Acceptance criteria

How will completion be judged?

## Evidence target

- [ ] E0 assertion
- [ ] E1 internal coherence
- [ ] E2 local execution
- [ ] E3 independent reproduction
- [ ] E4 external review
- [ ] E5 operational adoption

## Sufficiency requirement

What evaluator capacity is required before this milestone is admissible?

## Risks and blind spots

What could go wrong?

## Non-claims

What does this milestone not prove?
